signals.headline: **Joe Hathaway's special election**: Republican Joe Hathaway (likely "Joe Hathaway" in query) is in a tight April 16 run
signals.raw: **Joe Hathaway's special election**: Republican Joe Hathaway (likely "Joe Hathaway" in query) is in a tight April 16 runoff against Democrat Analilia Mejia for a New Jersey congressional seat vacated by Mikie Sherrill; no results or major announcements today, but Hathaway criticized Mejia for dodging in-person debates, with a virtual forum scheduled for this evening. [1][2]

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Inflows from Digital Asset Investors, Unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Inflows from Digital Asset Investors, Unseating Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP led with $119.6 million in inflows last week—its strongest since mid-December 2025—bringing year-to-date inflows to $159 million (7% of AUM), ahead of Bitcoin's $107.3 million (with net $145 million outflows in April so far) and Solana's $34.9 million.[3]

signals.headline: CME Expands Crypto Futures to Include Spot-Quoted Solana and XRP Contracts | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CME Expands Crypto Futures to Include Spot-Quoted Solana and XRP Contracts | YES | MED confidence**  
The Chicago Mercantile Exchange is launching spot-quoted futures for Solana (SOL) and XRP, marking a milestone for institutional adoption by differing from traditional futures structures.[6]

signals.headline: US, Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Before April 7 Two-Week Truce Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US, Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Before April 7 Two-Week Truce Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**

No new ceasefire has been confirmed, announced, or resolved as of April 15, 2026; instead, both sides are discussing fresh negotiations in locations like Islamabad or Pakistan to occur before the existing two-week ceasefire—announced April 7 or 8—ends early next week[1][2][3][4][6
